completion_promises.criterion_text: installer/core/commands/lib/task_status_json.py exists with a main() entry point and if __name__ == '__main__': guard
completion_promises.evidence: Created installer/core/commands/lib/task_status_json.py with main(argv) entry point and if __name__ == '__main__': sys.exit(main()) guard at module bottom. Verified via test_cli_base_path which calls main() directly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Scans tasks/backlog/, tasks/in_progress/, tasks/in_review/, tasks/blocked/, tasks/completed/ recursively (including feature subfolders and archive folders)
completion_promises.evidence: _scan_task_files() iterates TASK_STATUS_CATEGORIES and uses rglob('*.md') on each. Tested with test_nested_feature_subfolder (backlog/oauth/, backlog/login/) and test_completed_archive_subfolder (completed/2026-01/).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Parses frontmatter via task_utils.parse_task_frontmatter (no duplicate YAML-parsing logic)
completion_promises.evidence: Module imports parse_task_frontmatter from installer.core.commands.lib.task_utils and calls it exclusively. No YAML parsing logic duplicated in the new module.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Emits schema v1 JSON to stdout with fixed key order and tasks sorted by (status, id)
completion_promises.evidence: build_dashboard() constructs dict with keys in schema order (schema_version, generated_at, base_path, summary, tasks). Tasks sorted via tasks.sort(key=lambda t: (str(t.get('status') or ''), str(t.get('id') or ''))). Verified by test_sort_order and test_byte_stable_output.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Missing frontmatter fields are emitted as null, never omitted
completion_promises.evidence: _extract_task_record() iterates TASK_FIELDS list and calls _null_safe() on each. Sparse frontmatter test (test_missing_fields_are_null) writes a file with only id+status and verifies epic, feature, parent_review, feature_id are all None. test_extract_task_record_nulls verifies all 14 fields.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Malformed frontmatter degrades gracefully: task entry emitted with id derived from filename and parse_error: true (script never crashes on one bad file)
completion_promises.evidence: build_dashboard() catches ValueError from parse_task_frontmatter and emits record via _extract_task_record({}, rel_path, parse_error=True) which derives id from filename stem. Tested in test_malformed_frontmatter, test_no_frontmatter_delimiters, and test_mixed_good_and_bad.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Positional TASK-ID argument emits single-task JSON; unknown ID exits 1 with a stderr message
completion_promises.evidence: main() checks args.task_id and calls build_single_task(). If not found, prints stderr message and returns 1. Tested via subprocess in test_valid_task_exit_code (exit 0) and test_missing_task_exit_code (exit 1 with 'not found' in stderr).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests in tests/unit/commands/test_task_status_json.py cover: empty project, multi-state scan, nested feature subfolder, malformed frontmatter, single-task lookup, missing-task exit code, byte-stable output across two invocations
completion_promises.evidence: 21 tests covering all required scenarios: test_empty_project, test_missing_tasks_root, test_multi_state_scan, test_nested_feature_subfolder, test_completed_archive_subfolder, test_malformed_frontmatter, test_no_frontmatter_delimiters, test_mixed_good_and_bad, test_single_task_lookup, test_single_task_lookup_includes_malformed, test_missing_task_exit_code, test_valid_task_exit_code, test_byte_stable_output, test_byte_stable_output_subprocess, test_missing_fields_are_null, test_extract_task_record_nulls, test_build_summary, test_build_summary_ignores_unknown_status, test_null_safe, test_cli_base_path, test_sort_order.
All 21 tests passed on final run: 21 passed, 2 warnings in 2.68s. Exit code 0.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Code follows PEP 8 conventions, uses type hints, docstrings, pathlib.Path, logging/stderr for diagnostics. No third-party dependencies added beyond pyyaml (already in project dependencies). Import structure follows existing module patterns.
